scripts.bags:smoke: npx ts-node -r dotenv/config -r tsconfig-paths/register --project tsconfig.json scripts/bags-smoke-readonly.ts

scripts.bags:enricher: npx ts-node -r dotenv/config -r tsconfig-paths/register --project tsconfig.json services/bags-enricher/src/index.ts
scripts.db:migrate: npx ts-node -r dotenv/config -r tsconfig-paths/register --project tsconfig.json scripts/apply-db-migrations.ts
scripts.supabase:smoke: npx ts-node -r dotenv/config -r tsconfig-paths/register --project tsconfig.json scripts/supabase-smoke.ts
